<<THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS>>

THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS ARE AS FOLLOWS:

THE MLE FOR MU_X IS [THE SAMPLE MEAN OF X_i]

THE MLE FOR MU_Y IS [THE SAMPLE MEAN OF Y_i]

THE MLE FOR SIGMA_X_SQUARED IS [THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF X_i]

THE MLE FOR SIGMA_Y_SQUARED IS [THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF Y_i]

THE MLE FOR SIGMA_XY IS [THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN X_i AND Y_i]

<<THE HYPOTHESIS TEST FOR THE EFFECT OF THE DRUG>>

TO TEST THE HYPOTHESIS THAT THE DRUG HAS A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE, WE USE THE FOLLOWING TEST:

THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS [H_0: MU_Y - MU_X = 0]

THE ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS IS [H_1: MU_Y - MU_X ≠ 0]

THE TEST STATISTIC IS [T = (BAR_Y - BAR_X) / (SQRT[(SIGMA_Y_SQUARED / N) + (SIGMA_X_SQUARED / N) - (SIGMA_XY / (N * N))])]

THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS [IF |T| > [THE Z-VALUE FOR ALPHA/2], THEN [REJECT H_0]]

THE SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL IS [0.05]

<<THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS>>

THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS ARE AS FOLLOWS:

THE MLE FOR MU_X IS [THE SAMPLE MEAN OF X_i]

THE MLE FOR MU_Y IS [THE SAMPLE MEAN OF Y_i]

THE MLE FOR SIGMA_X_SQUARED IS [THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF X_i]

THE MLE FOR SIGMA_Y_SQUARED IS [THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF Y_i]

THE MLE FOR SIGMA_XY IS [THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN X_i AND Y_i]
